Waveform Audio (WAVEFORMATEX): Signature update - removal of wformat chunk due to DROID not currently being able to handle inverted sequences. For further details see issues #805 and #806 in the DROID GitHub page (https://github.com/digital-preservation/droid/issues). Submitted by Preservica.
